summary: Russian forces used FPV drones to kill a soldier who pretended to surrender and then attempted to flee. In Taganrog, a drone and missile attack damaged commercial warehouses and a vessel in Taganrog Bay. Two Russian "Yolka" air defense drones simultaneously intercepted an enemy fixed-wing UAV in a kinetic kill. Operators from Russia's "Rubicon" Center reported destroying 118 Ukrainian targets on April 3 and 144 on April 4, including fixed-wing UAVs and control points. Ukrainian forces struck a storage site for Orion drones and radar equipment in occupied Crimea, coordinated with the Deep Strike Center.
